description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and forearm, complemented by a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is ergonomically shaped with a slight curve at the butt for comfortable shouldering, and the wood grain is visible, giving it a traditional appearance. The barrel is straight and slender, extending the full length of the rifle, and is fitted with iron sights for aiming. The trigger guard and trigger are made of metal, positioned just ahead of the stock's grip. There is no visible magazine protruding from the rifle, suggesting an internal or single-shot mechanism. The overall finish is a combination of polished wood and matte metal, typical of hunting or sporting rifles.
description: A traditional rifle with a polished wooden stock and a long, matte metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a classic sporting design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, trigger guard, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: View from the buttstock, showing the rear of the rifle and the curvature of the stock.
